synthesis: Mobius closed C-313 in green posture at GI 0.83, but the integrity headline is still sourced from mock while the 24-hour heartbeat band ranged from 0.63 to 0.92. The ledger registered 4 events, all in ZEUS verification, while institutional remained the strongest visible domain signal at 0.866 and the micro lane carried 11 error-state instruments. ZEUS remains inconclusive and the vault quorum path is still unregistered for this cycle. Forward signal: watch infrastructure resilience and quorum registration for confirmation or further drift in the next cycle.
